name: alberta-assisted-living
description: Find Alberta continuing care, supportive living, and seniors' housing through your assistant - accessibility first.
long_description: An independent, public-interest tool built on the Government of Alberta's public Assisted Living Navigator data. Search continuing care, supportive living, and seniors' housing in plain language - by name or near a place - with accessibility as a first-class filter. Read-only: it finds and explains options and points you to the facility and Alberta Health Services. It never applies, reserves a space, pays, or stores credentials. Part of The Open State, a reference implementation of the Civic Access Protocol. Not operated by or endorsed by the Government of Alberta.

tools.name: search_facilities_by_name
tools.description: Find Alberta assisted living and continuing care facilities by name.

tools.name: find_facilities_near
tools.description: Find facilities near a place (or coordinates), nearest first, filtered by accessibility, care type, room type, amenities, and current vacancy.

tools.name: get_facility_details
tools.description: Full plain-language detail for one facility: accessibility first, contact, care types, spaces, pricing, services, accreditation, official standards record, and photos.

tools.name: explain_care_options
tools.description: Plain-language guide to Alberta's care types, AHS funding and placement, and the search filters.
